steps.name: RunningState core, real SSE message + elapsed + indeterminate progress (BR-1)
Cancel flow, confirm >30s + dang huy sub-state (BR-3, BR-4, consumes 4-7)
Integrate into every Duyet to AI-step transition + stepper background indicator
Wire up tests + verify all AC + real browser

decisions: Tests co-located as src/components/workspace/__tests__/*.test.tsx (matches actual vitest.config.ts include glob + sibling components PipelineStepper/StaleConfirmDialog), not frontend/tests/unit/components/ as the task file literally states -- that path isn't picked up by the working config. See memory/project-memory.md Open Questions (frontend test-directory convention undocumented).

RunningState.pct is number|null, caller-supplied. Today's backend (run_service.py/research/node.py) only ever publishes pct=0 ('started' placeholder) or pct=100 ('completed') -- never a real in-between fraction yet. Component treats pct<=0 as indeterminate (BR-1: no fabricated %); the integration layer (Step 5) decides whether to pass the real event pct straight through or null it out.

No package.json/pnpm-workspace at repo root -- ran vitest via `npx vitest` from frontend/ directly instead of `pnpm --filter frontend vitest run` as the task file's Verify line states; functionally equivalent, no workspace tooling exists to filter against.

RunningStateError takes error (pre-classified all_providers_failed|generic) + viewerRole ('admin'|'creator') as caller-supplied props, not derived internally -- no SSE event for errors exists yet in docs/specs/event-catalog.md (only step.progress/project.status), and frontend AuthProvider/useAuth has no role field today. Whoever wires this in (Step 5, or 5-6/5-7) must shape the run's `error` field into one of the two variants and supply the viewer's role from wherever that becomes available.
Admin 'Quan tri > Providers' link points at /admin/api-keys (closest existing admin page) -- no dedicated /admin/providers page exists yet. Revisit if/when one is built.
